ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article (Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keywords extracted from the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Published date of the article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., blog, journal, news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiments" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the research paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the research paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the research paper */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the research paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article or research paper */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
